Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify keyword search can be submitted from the Home page search bar
Precondition: User is logged in as System Admin on the Home page.
Objective: To verify entering a keyword in the search bar and clicking Submit triggers a search.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter a keyword in the 'Keyword(s)' input field in the search bar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=textbox name="Keyword(s)" | value: board meeting
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Text 'board meeting' is entered in the Keyword(s) input field.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Submit' button in the search bar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Search is submitted. Search results are displayed or user is navigated to a search results page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Home' link in the left sidebar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User returns to the Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the login page.
